hooks.command: bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; cd "$root"; git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -z | while IFS= read -r -d "" file; do [ -f "$file" ] || continue; directory="$(dirname "$file")"; basename="$(basename "$file")"; (cd "$directory" && npx --no-install eslint --cache --cache-location "$root/.cache/eslint.json" --color --exit-on-fatal-error --fix --max-warnings 9999 --report-unused-disable-directives-severity error --report-unused-inline-configs error "$basename"); done'
